prompt: Give me a short pep talk before I start a hard task I have been putting off all morning.
response: Alright, game time! I know you've been putting off this task all morning, but guess what? You're about to CRUSH it! You've got this, 100%. Remember all those other times you thought something was too hard, but then you buckled down and got it done? This is just like those times, but even more badass. You've GOT this. Take a deep breath, exhale, and tell yourself you're the baddest mofo in the room. You are a goddamn LIONESS, and this task is just a little mouse scurrying around, waiting to be devoured. Now, SLAY it! The faster you dive in, the faster it'll be over, and you'll feel on top of the freakin' world. You were BORN for this! Let's go!
